Source   Edit  

Centralized logging system for EC4X engine

Provides structured logging with levels, categories, and file output Replaces scattered echo statements throughout the engine

Types

LogCategory {.pure.} = enum
  lcGeneral = "GENERAL", lcEconomy = "ECONOMY", lcFleet = "FLEET",
  lcColonization = "COLONIZATION", lcCombat = "COMBAT",
  lcDiplomacy = "DIPLOMACY", lcResearch = "RESEARCH", lcOrders = "ORDERS",
  lcAI = "AI", lcValidation = "VALIDATION"
Log categories for filtering and organization Source   Edit  

Vars

loggingEnabled = true
Source   Edit   
logToFile = false
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc closeEngineLogger() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc getLogFile(): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get current log file path Source   Edit   
proc initEngineLogger(logDir: string = ""; enableFileLogging: bool = false) {.
    ...raises: [OSError, IOError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, WriteDirEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Initialize engine logging system If logDir is provided and enableFileLogging is true, logs will be written to file Source   Edit
